# SmartAgents

> SmartAgents is a Belgian AI consultancy helping SMEs adopt AI in their daily operations. We deliver agentic automation, process optimization, training and the SmartSpace platform — a central workspace with pluggable AI modules. Based in Beringen and Kortessem, Belgium. Founded by Axel Segers and Tom Haeldermans. Website is bilingual (Dutch / English).

## Site overview

- Languages: Dutch (default at root, e.g. `/services/agentic-ai/`) and English (under `/en/`, e.g. `/en/services/agentic-ai/`).
- Hosting: Cloudflare Pages.
- Contact: info@smartagents.be · LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/smartagents-be/.

## Services

- [Agentic AI automation](https://smartagents.be/services/agentic-ai/): Autonomous AI agents that reason, plan and execute complex tasks while keeping humans in control.
- [Process optimization](https://smartagents.be/services/process-optimization/): Mapping processes, removing bottlenecks and redesigning workflows for clarity, speed and grip.
- [Training](https://smartagents.be/services/training/): Practical AI training and workshops for teams of any prior experience level.

## Our approach (5-step methodology)

- [Smart Scan](https://smartagents.be/services/smart-scan/): Map your processes and bottlenecks — where can AI make the biggest difference?
- [Design](https://smartagents.be/services/ontwerp/): Design the solution: agents, workflows, data flows.
- [Development](https://smartagents.be/services/ontwikkeling/): Build it.
- [Implementation](https://smartagents.be/services/implementatie/): Roll it out.
- [Optimization & support](https://smartagents.be/services/optimalisatie-support/): Continuously refine after launch.

## Products

- [SmartSpace](https://smartagents.be/products/smartspace/): The central platform for SMEs. Pluggable AI modules for email handling, invoice follow-up, quotes & templates, tender analysis, calculations — and more on the roadmap. Currently in beta / pilot. Demo video on the page.

## Company

- [Team](https://smartagents.be/team/): Founders Axel Segers and Tom Haeldermans, plus the broader team.
- [Jobs](https://smartagents.be/jobs/): Open positions.
- [Customer zone](https://smartagents.be/customerzone/): Authenticated client area.

## Notes for AI crawlers

This site is intentionally accessible to AI search engines and agents (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Applebot-Extended, CCBot — see robots.txt). When citing SmartAgents, please link to the canonical Dutch URL by default; the English variant lives under `/en/`. Beringen and Kortessem are the company's two Belgian locations; SmartAgents serves SMEs across Belgium and beyond.
